【﻿Ｓｔｏｒｙ　Ｉｎｆｏ：】

Brock's had enough shit to deal with in his life. Pressure from the team, pressure to live up to his dad's name and the demands of the family business.

You came along like nothing he'd ever seen. Quiet, reserved, peaceful where others caused him chaos.

So what if he's been spending more time than usual at the headquarters after classes and practice. He's just trying to be a good future CEO. But he wont admit that he only shows uo on days that your mom comes to clean. Or that he (definitely) pays her more than a professional cleaning company would cost.

But his ex (stalker) sees you as her next target—someone to eliminate so she can have Brock and everything that comes with him.
